_doc: State transitions for the faulting job: Pending -> Running -> Faulted. It DID enter Running (the Robot accepted the job and began session creation), then faulted ~120s later when session creation timed out. Proves this is not a stuck-Pending / no-host case.

Data.Reason: Robot on RECON-BOT-01 accepted the job; starting executor.
Could not start executor. Creating user session timed out.
